message:
feat(e2e): add verification gates and CI artifact persistence

Add two new modules to the e2e harness:

- verification_gates.rs: programmatic fmt/check/clippy/no-master-refs
  quality gates with JSON-serializable reports (bd-2als.6.2)
- ci_artifacts.rs: commit-tagged artifact bundles for benchmark JSONL,
  correctness verdicts, and recovery proof persistence (bd-2als.6.3)

Closes: bd-2als.2.3, bd-2als.2 (epic), bd-2als.4.4, bd-2als.4 (epic),
bd-2als.5.1, bd-2als.5.2, bd-2als.5.3, bd-2als.6.1, bd-2als.6.2,
bd-2als.6.3, bd-2als.6.4, bd-2als.6 (epic)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
